isolation.notes: Read-only site with hardcoded data, no shared mutable state

assertions.title: Catering inquiry form has all fields and validates

steps.observed: Catering page loaded with 'Private Chef & Catering' hero and 'Catering Inquiry' form section

steps.action: Take screenshot of empty form to verify all fields
steps.expected: All required fields present: name, number of guests, budget, date/time, location, event type, dietary restrictions, cuisine preferences, service type
steps.observed: All fields confirmed present: Name, Email, Phone, Number of Guests, Budget Range (dropdown with Under $5K, $5K-$10K, $10K-$20K, $20K+), Event Type (dropdown with Sit-Down Dinner Party, Catering, Tray-Passed Hors d'Oeuvres, Corporate Event), Event Date (date picker), Event Time (time picker), Location, Dietary & Allergy Restrictions (checkboxes: Vegan, Vegetarian, Gluten-Free, Nut Allergy, Shellfish Allergy, Other), Cuisine Preferences (textarea), Service Type (dropdown with Buffet, Tray-Passed, Sit-Down), Additional Notes (textarea)

steps.action: Click SUBMIT INQUIRY without filling any fields
steps.expected: Validation errors shown for required fields
steps.observed: Validation errors displayed: 'Name is required', 'Please enter a valid email address', 'Phone number is required', 'Enter a valid, expected number of guests (min)', 'Please select a budget range', 'Please select an event type', 'Event date is required', 'Event time is required', 'Location is required'

steps.action: Fill all required fields with test data
steps.observed: All fields filled: Name='John Test', Email='john@test.com', Phone='310-555-1234', Guests=50, Budget='$5K-$10K', Event Type='Sit-Down Dinner Party', Date='06/15/2026', Time='07:00 PM', Location='Beverly Hills, CA', Gluten-Free=checked, Cuisine Preferences='Southern comfort food with modern twists', Service Type='Sit-Down'

steps.expected: Form shown with all fields populated, no validation errors
steps.observed: Form displayed with all fields properly filled, no validation errors visible

evidence.network: No network requests - client-side form with hardcoded data

steps.action: Click SUBMIT INQUIRY with all required fields filled
steps.observed: Form replaced by success state showing green checkmark icon, heading 'Thank You for Your Inquiry', and message 'We've received your catering request. Chef Kyla or a member of our team will be in touch within 24-48 hours to discuss your event.'
Screenshot captured showing the success confirmation state with checkmark, heading, and descriptive message

evidence.network: Form submission logs to console - no API calls (as designed)

frictions.description: Native HTML select dropdowns could not be set via agent-browser 'select' command (timed out). Required using JavaScript eval to set values and dispatch change events.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to set select element values directly via JavaScript and dispatch change events

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-ABOUT-003 confirmed all required catering form fields are present (name, email, phone, number of guests, budget range, event type, event date, event time, location, dietary restrictions, cuisine preferences, service type) and validation errors appear for all required fields when submitting empty. VAL-ABOUT-004 confirmed that submitting the filled form shows a 'Thank You for Your Inquiry' success confirmation message.
